_comment: Phase-1 search ranges (movement/pressure/horizon constants). Archived here while phase-2 (scoring) tuning freezes these at the adopted avg (2p) / trial175 (4p) values. To re-tune phase 1, copy these keys back into intervals.json. Defaults: rotation=10, offset=15, enemy_offset=5, reinf_turns=20, decay=0.5, frontier=1.4, ally=0.8, horizon=30, max_distance=38.
